## TauriHolochainEnvironment interface

Environment injected by the in-process Tauri plugin (tauri-plugin-holochain) into a webview that is wired to a Holochain conductor running in the same process. Its presence signals that the App API should be reached through Tauri IPC rather than by opening a websocket.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface TauriHolochainEnvironment 
```

string


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ The Tauri plugin name used to build the IPC command name. Defaults to `"holochain"` when not provided.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[subscribeSignals?](./client.tauriholochainenvironment.subscribesignals.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

(cb: (bytes: Uint8Array) =&gt; void) =&gt; () =&gt; void


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Subscribe to the conductor's signal stream for this window, provided by the plugin's injected env (it bridges the plugin's Tauri signal events). The callback receives each signal as the msgpack bytes the app websocket would have carried. Returns a function that unsubscribes.

Absent when the plugin injects no signal bridge; the transport then simply delivers no signals.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
